deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'echo "[boot] PORT=${PORT:-8010}"; echo "[boot] running migrate"; timeout 120s python -m backend.database.migrate || echo "[boot] migrate failed/timed out, continuing"; echo "[boot] starting uvicorn"; exec python -m uvicorn backend.api:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-8010} --proxy-headers'
